compiled_state.title: plugin.json missing agents key — agents/ directory not scanned by plugin system
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
When plugin.json explicitly specifies component paths (skills, commands), the plugin system disables auto-discovery for unspecified components. The agents/ directory was never registered, so all 24 DSO agent definitions were invisible.

## Root Cause
plugin.json had 'skills' and 'commands' keys but no 'agents' key. Without it, the plugin system does not scan agents/.

## Fix
Added '"agents": "./agents/"' to plugin.json.

## Evidence
Before fix: /reload-plugins showed '29 agents' = 29 misclassified SKILL.md files + 0 real agents.
After skill fix (allowed-tools), the 29 fake agents became proper skills, exposing that real agents were never appearing.
